com.pax.poslink

Class ManageResponse

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.base.BaseResponse<ManageResponse>
      • com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse

  • public class ManageResponse
extends BaseResponse<ManageResponse>
    Management transaction response properties

    • Field Detail

      • ResultCode

        public java.lang.String ResultCode
        Result code of transaction.

        Attribute: ans6

        When code = 000000 means Approve. And other code means error.
        See ResultCode & ResultTxt for definition.

        Used to determine results of transaction.

      • ResultTxt

        public java.lang.String ResultTxt
        Result Txt of transaction.

        Attribute: ans…32

      • SN

        public java.lang.String SN
        Terminal SN.

        Attribute: ans…32

        Valid while request transaction is INIT.

      • VarValue

        public java.lang.String VarValue
        The value of the variable.

        Attribute: ans…60

        Valid while request transaction is GETVAR.

      • VarValue1

        public java.lang.String VarValue1
        The value of the variable 1.

        Attribute: ans…60

        Valid while request transaction is GETVAR.

      • VarValue2

        public java.lang.String VarValue2
        The value of the variable 2.

        Attribute: ans…60

        Valid while request transaction is GETVAR.

      • VarValue3

        public java.lang.String VarValue3
        The value of the variable 3.

        Attribute: ans…60

        Valid while request transaction is GETVAR.

      • VarValue4

        public java.lang.String VarValue4
        The value of the variable 4.

        Attribute: ans…60

        Valid while request transaction is GETVAR.

      • ButtonNum

        public java.lang.String ButtonNum
        The button number of selection.

        Attribute: n1

        Valid while request transaction is SHOWDIALOG/SHOWTEXTBOX.

      • SigFileName

        public java.lang.String SigFileName
        FileName of captured signature.

        Attribute: var

        Ex: 201108111743.png

        For Java on PC, if SigSavePath was not set, it will be saved at <execute directory>\img\receipts\201108111743.bmp
        For Android, if SigSavePath and appDataFolder are not set, it will use the AbstractPosLink.appDataFolder + "/img/receipt/" to save the signature.

        For signature capture, saves the signature vector coordinates. The value of vector coordinates is delimited with a caret (^) in the following format: x1,y1^x2,y2^xN,yN^~
        In the case of a pen-up event, usethe coordinate 0,65535 to signal a break in the line. ^ is the coordinate delimiter, ~ is the ending delimiter, and a comma (,) is the vector delimiter

        Valid while request transaction is GETSIGANTURE.

      • PinBlock

        public java.lang.String PinBlock
        The PIN BLOCK.

        Attribute: ans…16

        Valid while request transaction is GETPINBLOCK.

      • KSN

        public java.lang.String KSN
        The KSN.

        Attribute: ans…20

        Valid while request transaction is GETPINBLOCK or INPUTACCOUNT or AUTHORIZECARD or INPUTACCOUNTWITHEMV or MACCALCULATION or INCREASEKSN.

      • EntryMode

        public java.lang.String EntryMode
        The Entry Mode.

        Attribute: n1

        0: Manual
        1: Magnetic Card Swipe
        2: Contactless
        3: Scanner.
        4.Chip
        5.Chip Fall Back Swipe

        Valid while request transaction is INPUTACCOUNT or INPUTACCOUNTWITHEMV.

      • Track1Data

        public java.lang.String Track1Data
        Track1 data or tag 56, will be encrypted if the data encryption is enabled.

        Attribute: ans…128

        Valid while request transaction is INPUTACCOUNT or INPUTACCOUNTWITHEMV.

      • Track2Data

        public java.lang.String Track2Data
        Track2 data or tag 57 (Track 2 Equivalent Data), will be encrypted if the data encryption is enabled

        Attribute: ans…128

        Valid while request transaction is INPUTACCOUNT or INPUTACCOUNTWITHEMV.

      • Track3Data

        public java.lang.String Track3Data
        Track3 data, will be encrypted if the data encryption is enabled.

        Attribute: ans…128

        Valid while request transaction is INPUTACCOUNT or INPUTACCOUNTWITHEMV.

      • PAN

        public java.lang.String PAN
        Account Number or tag 5A (PAN), will be encrypted if the data encryption is enabled.

        Attribute: ans…32

        Valid while request transaction is INPUTACCOUNT or INPUTACCOUNTWITHEMV.

      • MaskedPAN

        public java.lang.String MaskedPAN
        The Masked PAN of the card. Examples:
        XXXXXX******XXXX
        XXXXXXXX****XXXX

        Attribute: ans…32

        Valid while request transaction is INPUTACCOUNTWITHEMV or TOKENADMINISTRATIVE.

      • ExpiryDate

        public java.lang.String ExpiryDate
        The expiration date for manual entry in format of MMYY.

        Attribute: n4

        Valid while request transaction is INPUTACCOUNT or INPUTACCOUNTWITHEMV..

      • QRCode

        public java.lang.String QRCode
        QR code from scanner in plain text.

        Attribute: ans…128

        Valid while request transaction is INPUTACCOUNT or INPUTACCOUNTWITHEMV..

      • Text

        public java.lang.String Text
        Text input by customer. For currency input, 10000 will be returned if the customer input $100.00 on device.

        Attribute: ans…32

        Valid while request transaction is INPUTTEXT/SHOWTEXTBOX.

      • EMVData

        public java.lang.String EMVData
        EMV TLV data.

        Attribute: ans…1024

        If contact EMV card is read successfully, some related EMV data will be returned in consecutive TLV format data.

        Format: tag + data
        Note: All the EMV TLV data shall be expanded to double length.
        Example:
        AID (A0 00 00 00 04 10 10)"\x4F\x07\xA0\x00\x00\x00\x04\x10\x10" -> "4F07A0000000041010"
        Cardholder Name ("JACK")"\x5F\x20\x04\x4A\x41\x43\x4B" -> "5F20044A41434B"

        See EMV Tags for Response of Input Account for definition.
        See EMV Tags for Response of Authorize Card for definition.
        See EMV Tags for Response of Complete Online EMV for definition.
        Only return the following flags if the application is Termlink or if the PAN is in whitelist:
        EMV Tags for Response of Get EMV TLV Data

        Valid when the request transaction = AUTHORIZECARD or COMPLETEONLINEEMV or INPUTACCOUNTWITHEMV or GETEMVTLVData

      • ExtData

        public java.lang.String ExtData
        Extended data in XML format

        Example:<TagName>x</TagName>

        See PaymentResponse ExtData for definition.

      • AuthorizationResult

        public java.lang.String AuthorizationResult
        Indicate the transaction result.

        Attribute: n1

        0: transaction offline approved

        Transaction is AUTHORIZECARD:
        Indicate the transaction result after 1st GAC:
        0: transaction offline approved
        1: transaction offline declined
        2: transaction online authorization needed

        Transaction is COMPLETEONLINEEMV:
        Indicate the below transaction result after 2nd GAC:
        0: transaction approved
        1: transaction declined
        Indicate the below transaction result for partial EMV only.
        2: partial EMV approve
        3: partial EMV decline

        Transaction is INPUTACCOUNTWITHEMV:
        For CONTACTLESS TRANSACTION ONLY.
        Indicate the transaction result:
        0: transaction offline approved
        1: transaction offline declined
        2: transaction online authorization needed

        Valid when the request transaction = AUTHORIZECARD or COMPLETEONLINEEMV or INPUTACCOUNTWITHEMV

      • SignatureFlag

        public java.lang.String SignatureFlag
        Indicate that if signature is needed.

        Attribute: n1

        0: Signature NOT needed
        1: Signature needed

        Valid when the request transaction = AUTHORIZECARD or COMPLETEONLINEEMV

      • TagList

        public java.lang.String TagList
        List of tags which have been set successfully. All the tags are consecutive without any separator.

        Attribute: ans…1024

        Request for tag 0x9F26 0x9F27 0x4F, then this field would be: "9F269F274F"

        Valid only when TransType = GETEMVTLVDATA

      • ModelName

        public java.lang.String ModelName
        Model Name.

        Attribute: ans…32

        Valid while request transaction is INIT.

      • PrimaryFirmVersion

        @Deprecated
public java.lang.String PrimaryFirmVersion
        Deprecated. 
        Primary Firmware Version, OS Version.

        Attribute: ans…32

        Valid while request transaction is INIT.

        @deprecated Renamed to OSVersion

      • OSVersion

        public java.lang.String OSVersion
        OS Version.

        Attribute: ans…32

        Valid while request transaction is INIT.

      • MacAddress

        public java.lang.String MacAddress
        MAC address for LAN module in text.

        Attribute: ans12

        Valid while request transaction is INIT.

      • LinesPerScreen

        public java.lang.String LinesPerScreen
        Number of lines per screen for ShowMessage command.

        Attribute: n…2

        Valid while request transaction is INIT.

      • CharsPerLine

        public java.lang.String CharsPerLine
        Number of characters per line for ShowMessage command. 2 types of Numbers:

        Attribute: n…2

        1. Fix value for terminal models with Matrix Font Lib.
        2. Changeable value for terminal models with Vector Font value since the size is depending on the text, so terminal is always taking “W” in capital as the sample text and calculate the numbers.

        Valid while request transaction is INIT.

      • CardInsertStatus

        public java.lang.String CardInsertStatus
        Card insert status.

        Attribute: n1

        0: No card is inserted. 1: EMV Card is inserted. 2: Card is inserted, but this is not the EMV card. (Prolin Only)

        Valid when the requested transaction =CARDINSERTDETECTION.

      • BarcodeType

        public java.lang.String BarcodeType
        Barcode Type

        Attribute: n1

        '0'- QRCode '1' – 2D-barcode '2' – 3Dbarcode

      • BarcodeData

        public java.lang.String BarcodeData
        Barcode data

        Attribute: ans..128

      • EncryptionTransmissionBlock

        public java.lang.String EncryptionTransmissionBlock
        Encryption Transmission Block. Only valid when Encryption Flag as 4 (Voltage E2EE).

        Attribute: ans..512

      • PinBypassStatus

        public java.lang.String PinBypassStatus
        Indicate whether PIN bypassed.

        Attribute: n1

        0: False 1: True

        Valid while request transaction is INPUTACCOUNTWITHEMV/AUTHORIZECARD.

      • CVVCode

        public java.lang.String CVVCode
        The CVV code, if the switch in terminal turns on, this field can exist or NULL, else it must be NULL. Only CREDIT/GIFT supports it

        Attribute: n…4

        Valid when the requested transaction =INPUTACCOUNTWITHEMV.

      • ZipCode

        public java.lang.String ZipCode
        The zip code

        Attribute: ans…9

        Valid when the requested transaction =INPUTACCOUNTWITHEMV.

      • CardHolderName

        public java.lang.String CardHolderName
        The card holder name, if the card holder name exists, this field is mandatory.

        Attribute: ans…32

        Valid while request transaction is INPUTACCOUNTWITHEMV.

      • ServiceCode

        public java.lang.String ServiceCode
        The service code of the card

        Attribute: n…3

        Valid when the requested transaction =INPUTACCOUNTWITHEMV.

      • ContactlessTransactionPath

        public java.lang.String ContactlessTransactionPath
        Contactless transaction path.

        Attribute: ans2

        00 - EMV contact
        10 - contactless PAYPASS (MSD)
        11 - contactless PAYPASS (MCHIP)
        20 - contactless PAYWAVE (MSD)
        21 - contactless PAYWAVE (QVSDC)
        22 - contactless PAYWAVE (CONTACT)
        23 - contactless PAYWAVE (WAVE2)
        24 - contactless PAYWAVE (MSD_CVN17)
        25 - contactless PAYWAVE (MSD_LEGACY)
        26 - contactless PAYWAVE (VSDC)
        30 - contactless DPAS (MSD)
        31 – contactless DPAS (EMV)
        32 – contactless DPAS (ZIP)
        40 - contactless EXPRESSPAY (MSD)
        41 - contactless EXPRESSPAY (EMV)
        50 - contactless JCB (MSD)
        51 - contactless JCB (EMV)
        52 - contactless JCB (LEGACY)
        53 - contactless JCB (WAVE2)
        60 - contactless qPBOC (QVSDC)
        61 - contactless qPBOC (VSDC)
        70 - contactless Flash (EMV)
        The first character represents the card type

        Valid when the requested transaction = INPUTACCOUNTWITHEMV.

      • OnlinePINFlag

        public java.lang.String OnlinePINFlag
        For CONTACTLESS TRANSACTION ONLY: Indicate that if online PIN is needed

        Attribute: n1

        0: Online PIN is NOT needed 1: Online PIN is needed

      • SignStatus

        public java.lang.String SignStatus
        1: Done the signature. 0: Signature not done;

        Attribute: n1

        Valid while request transaction is SHOWTEXTBOX.

      • LabelSelected

        public java.lang.String LabelSelected
        The Radio or CheckBox number of selection.

        Attribute: ans..7

        Radio Selection (one only)
        “1” = 1 …”4” = 4
        CheckBox Selection,
        “1,2,3,4” means all four checkboxes are selected. ‘,’ is the delimiter.

        Valid when requested transaction = SHOWDIALOGFORM.

      • EncryptedEMVTLVData

        public java.lang.String EncryptedEMVTLVData
        Encrypted EMV TLV Data. See EMVData

        Attribute: ans…1024

        Valid when the requested transaction = INPUTACCOUNTWITHEMV.

      • EncryptedSensitiveTLVData

        public java.lang.String EncryptedSensitiveTLVData
        Encrypted SRED data.

        Attribute: ans…1024

        Please see the definition format of Encrypted Sensitive TLV Data

        Valid when the requested transaction = INPUTACCOUNTWITHEMV.

      • Token

        public java.lang.String Token
        Token value.

        Attribute: ans...128

        Valid when the requested transaction = TOKENADMINISTRATIVE.

      • TokenSN

        public java.lang.String TokenSN
        Merchant’s token serial number.

        Attribute: ans...32

        Valid when the requested transaction = TOKENADMINISTRATIVE.

      • WifiMac

        public java.lang.String WifiMac

        Attribute: ans...12

        WIFI mac address for WIFI modules in text

        Valid while request transaction is INIT.

      • BlockValue

        public java.lang.String BlockValue

        Only valid when M1 command is 1(read) and 5(read the M1 card SN).
        The format is HEX and the length is 32.
        For example, "01234567890123ABCDEF" means "\x01\x23\x45\x67\x89\x01\x23\xAB\xCD\xEF"

        Attribute: ans..32

        Valid when requested transaction = MIFARECARD

      • Checksum

        public java.lang.String Checksum

        Attribute: ans..32

        Checksum of the file.The algorithm is MD5.

        Valid when requested transaction = CHECKFILE

      • SAFMode

        public java.lang.String SAFMode
        Store and forward mode indicator

        Attribute: n1

        0: Stay Online.
        1: Stay Offline
        2: Offline Till batch.
        3: Offline On Demand/Auto.

        Valid when requested transaction = GETSAFPARAMETERS

      • StartDateTime

        public java.lang.String StartDateTime
        The effective start date time, YYYYMMDDhhmmss. Valid for SAF mode as 1.

        Attribute: n14

        Valid when requested transaction = GETSAFPARAMETERS

      • EndDateTime

        public java.lang.String EndDateTime
        The effective end date time, YYYYMMDDhhmmss. Valid for SAF mode as 1.

        Attribute: n14

        Valid when requested transaction = GETSAFPARAMETERS

      • DurationInDays

        public java.lang.String DurationInDays
        SAF On for next number of days from today. Valid for SAF mode as 1.

        Attribute: n..3

        Valid when requested transaction = GETSAFPARAMETERS

      • MaxNumber

        public java.lang.String MaxNumber
        SAF max number of record - SAF only support this number of records. i.e. 50 SAF only, once it reached it will stop working.

        Attribute: n...4

        Valid when requested transaction = GETSAFPARAMETERS

      • TotalCeilingAmount

        public java.lang.String TotalCeilingAmount
        Total ceiling amount. Once this amount is reached it will not accept any SAF record

        Attribute: n...12

        Valid when requested transaction = GETSAFPARAMETERS

      • CeilingAmountPerCardType

        public java.lang.String CeilingAmountPerCardType
        Once this amount is reached it will not accept any SAF record.
        Separated by Card Type with space in the card type sequence of “Visa MasterCard AMEX Diners Discover JCB enRoute VisaFleet MasterCardFleet FleetOne Fleetwide Fuleman Gascard Voyager WrightExpress Extended(others) Interac CUP Maestro Sinclair”, i.e. “2000 2000 2000 2000 2000 2000 2000 2000 2000 2000 2000 2000 2000 2000 2000 2000 2000 2000 2000 2000”.
        Note: The value of “2000” without any spaces means taking 2000 as unified ceiling amount for each card type.
        Empty value means ceiling amount validation will not be started during SAF.

        Attribute: ans...64

        Valid when requested transaction = GETSAFPARAMETERS

      • HALOPerCardType

        public java.lang.String HALOPerCardType
        Once this amount per trans is reached it will not accept any SAF record.
        Separated by Card Type with space in the card type sequence of “Visa MasterCard AMEX Diners Discover JCB enRoute VisaFleet MasterCardFleet FleetOne Fleetwide Fuleman Gascard Voyager WrightExpress Extended(others) Interac CUP Maestro Sinclair”, i.e. “2000 2000 2000 2000 2000 2000 2000 2000 2000 2000 2000 2000 2000 2000 2000 2000 2000 2000 2000 2000”.
        1 exception that value of “2000” without any spaces means taking 2000 as unified HALO amount for each card type.
        Empty value means HALO amount validation will not be started during SAF.

        Attribute: ans...64

        Valid when requested transaction = GETSAFPARAMETERS

      • UploadMode

        public java.lang.String UploadMode
        SAF Uploading mode.

        Attribute: n...1

        0: Upload before batch.
        1: Silent Auto Upload.

        Valid when requested transaction = GETSAFPARAMETERS

      • AutoUploadIntervalTime

        public java.lang.String AutoUploadIntervalTime
        Auto uploading checking interval in unit of 100ms.

        Attribute: n...4

        Valid when requested transaction = GETSAFPARAMETERS

      • DeleteSAFConfirmation

        public java.lang.String DeleteSAFConfirmation
        Delete SAF Confirmation.

        Attribute: n...1

        0: with Prompt.
        1: without Prompt.

        Valid when requested transaction = GETSAFPARAMETERS

      • VASResponseInfo

        public VASResponseInfo VASResponseInfo
        Response VAS Information
        See Also:
        VASResponseInfo

      • ResultData

        public java.lang.String ResultData
        The MAC result, represented in hexadecimal

        Attribute: ans...16

        Valid when requested transaction = MACCALCULATION

        Since:
        V1.03.00

      • MultiMerchant

        public MultiMerchant MultiMerchant
        Response MultiMerchant
        Since:
        V1.04.00
        See Also:

        Valid when requested transaction = GETVAR

      • DeviceInfo

        public ManageResponse.DeviceInfo DeviceInfo
        Response DeviceInfo
        Since:
        V1.04.00
        See Also:

        Valid when requested transaction = INIT

      • Cvm

        public java.lang.String Cvm
        Cardholder Verification Method (CVM) Codes,

        0 - Fail CVM processing
        1 - Plaintext Offline PIN Verification
        2 - Online PIN
        3 - Plaintext Offline PIN and Signature
        4 - Enciphered Offline PIN Verification
        5 - Enciphered Offline PIN Verification and Signature
        6 - Signature
        7 - No CVM Required
        8 - On Device CVM

        Attribute: n1

        Valid when requested transaction = AUTHORIZECARD /INPUTACCOUNTWITHEMV

        Since:
        V1.04.00

      • TxnResult

        public java.lang.String TxnResult
        For full integration only.

        0 - transaction offline declined
        1 - transaction need to be authorized online
        2 - transaction offline approved

        Attribute: n1

        Valid when requested transaction = INPUTACCOUNTWITHEMV

      • TxnPath

        public java.lang.String TxnPath
        For full integration only.
        The first character represents the card type

        00 - EMV contact
        10 - contactless PAYPASS (MSD)
        11 - contactless PAYPASS (MCHIP)
        20 - contactless PAYWAVE (MSD)
        21 - contactless PAYWAVE (QVSDC)
        22 - contactless PAYWAVE (CONTACT)
        23 - contactless PAYWAVE (WAVE2)
        24 - contactless PAYWAVE (MSD_CVN17)
        25 - contactless PAYWAVE (MSD_LEGACY)
        26 - contactless PAYWAVE (VSDC)
        30 - contactless DPAS (MSD)
        31 - contactless DPAS (EMV)
        32 - contactless DPAS (ZIP)
        40 - contactless EXPRESSPAY (MSD)
        41 - contactless EXPRESSPAY (EMV)
        50 - contactless JCB (MSD)
        51 - contactless JCB (EMV)
        52 - contactless JCB (LEGACY)
        53 - contactless JCB (WAVE2)
        60 - contactless qPBOC (QVSDC)
        61 - contactless qPBOC (VSDC)
        70 - contactless Flash (EMV)

        Attribute: ans2

        Valid when requested transaction = INPUTACCOUNTWITHEMV

      • IssuerScriptResults

        public java.lang.String IssuerScriptResults
        Issuer script results, HEX format.

        Attribute: an...512

        Valid when requested transaction = COMPLETEONLINEEMV

      • Touchscreen

        public java.lang.String Touchscreen
        Indicates whether terminal use a touchscreen.

        Y: Use
        N: Not use

        Attribute: 1

        Valid when requested transaction = INIT

        Since:
        V1.07.00

      • GetPEDInfoResponse

        public ManageResponse.GetPEDInfoResponse GetPEDInfoResponse
        The Response of GetPEDInformation. See ManageResponse.GetPEDInfoResponse for detail.

        Valid when requested transaction = GETPEDINFORMATION

        Since:
        V1.05.00

      • PinpadType

        public java.lang.String PinpadType
        Pinpad Type:

        0: Internal Pinpad
        1: External Pinpad

        Attribute: n1

        Valid when requested transaction = INPUTACCOUNTWITHEMV/AUTHORIZACARD/GETPINBLOCK/SHOWMESSAGECENTER/REMOVECARD

        Since:
        V1.08.00

      • LuhnValidationResult

        public java.lang.String LuhnValidationResult
        If terminal not support, this field is empty. Otherwise, it will use following value.

        0: Not performed
        1: Passed
        2: Failed

        Please note:
        1. Not all card support Luhn. So please make sure the card support Luhn before you use this field.
        If the card not support Luhn, this value is invalid.
        2. Terminal will verify Luhn only when entry mode is Manual or Swipe.

        Attribute: n1

        Valid when requested transaction = INPUTACCOUNTWITHEMV

        Since:
        V1.09.00

      • HardwareConfigurationBitmap

        public java.lang.String HardwareConfigurationBitmap
        Determines what hardware is supported on the device. "1" for each position means the hardware is present and supported by the application, "0" means the hardware is not supported or present. Please see Hardware Bitmap Definition
        for details.

        Attribute: n16

        Valid when requested transaction = INIT

        Since:
        V1.09.01

      • CustomEncryptedData

        public java.util.List<java.lang.String> CustomEncryptedData
        An array of encrypted strings representing custom encrypted data.

        Attribute: var

        Since:
        V1.09.01

      • CustomMACInfo

        public ManageResponse.CustomMACInfo CustomMACInfo
        Data encrypted by MAC Key.
        Please see ManageResponse.CustomMACInfo for detail.

        Attribute: Var

        Valid when requested transaction = INPUTACCOUNTWITHEMV

        Since:
        V1.12.00

      • AppActivated

        public java.lang.String AppActivated
        Whether the application is activated

        Y: Activated N: Not activated

        If value is empty, not support.

        Attribute: ans1

        Valid when requested transaction = INIT

        Since:
        V1.10.00

      • LicenseExpiry

        public java.lang.String LicenseExpiry
        The application license expiration time.
        MMDDYYYY format

        Attribute: n…8

        Valid when requested transaction = INIT

        Since:
        V1.10.00

      • EncryptionResultData

        public java.lang.String EncryptionResultData
        The Encryption Data out.
        For Encryption or Decryption data, the max length is 1024 bytes, the Hex string length is 2048.

        Attribute: ans..2048

        Since:
        V1.14.00
